query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agente_streak (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  chaveJ VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  ultimoAcesso DATE NOT NULL,
  streakAtual INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  maiorStreak INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  totalAcessos INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_streak_chaveJ (chaveJ)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agente_metas (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  chaveJ VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  mesRef VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  metaConsig DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  metaConsorcio DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  metaOurocap DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  metaCc DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  metaTotal DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_meta_agente_mes (chaveJ, mesRef)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agente_conquistas (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  chaveJ VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  codigo VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  icone VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'trophy',
  conquistadoEm TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_conquista_agente (chaveJ, codigo)
);
